name: charlotteonthecheap-mcp
description: Find free and cheap things to do in Charlotte — daily event listings, deals, and local guides from Charlotte On The Cheap

cotc_base_url.title: Site base URL (optional)
cotc_base_url.description: Override the Charlotte On The Cheap base URL. Leave blank to use the default. The site is public — no credentials are needed.

tools.name: cotc_list_events
tools.description: List Charlotte events for a given day, with time, price and venue

tools.name: cotc_events_month_overview
tools.description: Day-by-day overview of a month's events with true per-day counts

tools.name: cotc_search_posts
tools.description: Search articles by text, category, location and date range

tools.name: cotc_get_post
tools.description: Fetch one article in full as readable text or HTML

tools.name: cotc_list_categories
tools.description: List article categories with ids and post counts

tools.name: cotc_list_locations
tools.description: List Charlotte-area locations with ids and post counts
